title: Zipline adds ex-Tesla, Uber, Waymo execs to make drone delivery mainstream across U.S.
summary_full: Zipline is growing its drone delivery business in the U.S., and has hired former Tesla, Uber Eats and Waymo executives to help it scale up in new markets.
summary_public: Zipline is growing its drone delivery business in the U.S., and has hired former Tesla, Uber Eats and Waymo executives to help it scale up in new markets.
